source: LHDN (Lembaga Hasil Dalam Negeri) personal income tax relief schedule, hasil.gov.my. PRS relief extension confirmed via Private Pension Administrator Malaysia (ppa.my).
notes: Personal income tax reliefs for Year of Assessment 2026 (filed in 2027). Amounts mirror the LHDN YA2025 schedule, which carries forward unless changed by Budget 2026. FLAG: re-verify each amount against the finalised Budget 2026 / LHDN YA2026 schedule before campaign use — Budget measures occasionally adjust caps or add/expire reliefs. Many reliefs are 'restricted' (capped and subject to conditions); max_relief_rm is the cap, not an automatic deduction.

reliefs.label: Private Retirement Scheme & Deferred Annuity
reliefs.notes: Up to RM3,000 per year of assessment for PRS contributions and deferred annuity premiums. Extended through YA2030. This is the relief most relevant to PRS content.

reliefs.label: Life Insurance & EPF Contributions
reliefs.notes: Combined cap RM7,000: up to RM4,000 for EPF contributions (mandatory or voluntary) plus up to RM3,000 for life insurance / takaful premiums.

reliefs.label: Education & Medical Insurance
reliefs.notes: Premiums for education or medical insurance/takaful.

reliefs.label: Lifestyle — books, computer, internet, skills courses
reliefs.notes: Restricted. Books/journals, personal computer/smartphone/tablet, internet subscription, and self-improvement course fees.

reliefs.label: Sports Equipment & Activity
reliefs.notes: Restricted. Sports equipment, facility rental/entry fees, competition registration, gym membership.

reliefs.label: EV Charging Facilities
reliefs.notes: Restricted. Installation, rental, purchase, or subscription of EV charging equipment for the home.

reliefs.label: SSPN Education Savings (net deposit)
reliefs.notes: Restricted. Net deposit into a child's SSPN (Skim Simpanan Pendidikan Nasional) account.

reliefs.label: Childcare Fees (child aged 6 and below)
reliefs.notes: Restricted. Fees to a registered childcare centre or kindergarten.

reliefs.label: Self-Education Fees
reliefs.notes: Restricted. Tertiary fees for approved fields; upskilling/self-enhancement courses are sub-capped within this.

reliefs.label: Medical — serious disease, fertility, exams, vaccination
reliefs.notes: Restricted bundle. Includes serious-disease treatment, fertility treatment, a sub-cap for full medical examination / COVID-19 test / mental health, and vaccination.

reliefs.label: Parents — medical, care, dental
reliefs.notes: Restricted. Medical treatment, special needs and carer expenses for parents.

reliefs.label: Disability Support Equipment
reliefs.notes: Restricted. Supporting equipment for a disabled self, spouse, child, or parent.

reliefs.label: Housing Loan Interest — first residential home
reliefs.notes: Restricted, time-limited. For a first home valued up to RM500,000; verify eligibility window against the current schedule.
